page: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6 family virtual machine configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel processor and running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server type features 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage options, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

As a network-optimized and premium storage capable instance, the E64ns_v6 is designed for workloads requiring significant memory capacity and network throughput without the need for local disk space. The 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio positions this server in the memory-optimized class, offering high resource density for memory-bound applications. Because there is no local storage or GPU hardware bundled, the cost profile is focused on dedicated compute and memory resources. This configuration is suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database management systems utilizing remote premium storage, enterprise applications, and network-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6 family virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel processor, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It provides 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio that aligns with memory-optimized workloads. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on its Premium Storage capability for external disk attachments, and contains zero integrated GPUs. Designed with network optimization in mind, this server type delivers a high-density memory configuration without the overhead of local disk resources. It is suitable for memory-intensive applications, relational databases, enterprise software, and network-heavy data processing workloads that utilize remote storage solutions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6 family virtual machine with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for network performance and memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized, network-ready virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for enterprise workloads.
